title: Architecting an Idempotency Layer
description: Architect an idempotency layer using Idempotency-Key tracking with tools like Redis. Guarantee "Exactly-Once" execution for non-idempotent operations such as payment processing.
objectives: Architect an idempotency layer using Idempotency-Key tracking with tools like Redis.
Guarantee "Exactly-Once" execution for non-idempotent operations such as payment processing.
